title: Electric Skateboard with Remote, Campus Street 33" Maple Twin Tip Electric Longboard, 4 Speed Smooth Braking, Easy Carry Handle Design, for Adults Teens Beginners
features: 【4 SPEED ＆ SMOOTH BRAKING】● Electric longboard for adults comes with a 4-speed remote, easily switching speeds, making it for enhancing balance and riding skills for teens and beginners. Sensitive control system for precise speed control and smooth braking. Safer than traditional skateboards.

【7-PLY MAPLE DECK】● Constructed from strong high-density 8-ply maple, the portable campus electric skateboard comfortably supports up to 200 lbs and distributes weight evenly for stable rides, even at top speeds. The deck has elasticity and toughness, and the board shape is more comfortable and stable.

【POWERFUL PERFORMANCE】● The Longboard Skateboard for adults is equipped with 350W hub motors, can reach speeds of up to 25km/h, and is easy to climb 18% hill, providing a range of up to 15 km, ensuring you can travel smoothly on uphill, sandy, or snowy days. Also, it is very quiet & does not need maintenance.

【PORTABLE & LIGHTWEIGHT】● This remote-controlled skateboard weighs only 5 kg, you can easily carry it anywhere. Entry-level adult maple skateboard is an essential tool for commuting, leisure riding, traveling, or going to school for teenagers. You can easily take it anywhere, give you a new experiment.

【THE URBAN EXPLORER'S COMPANION】● The electric Cruiser longboard takes you to experience the ultimate sense of speed. supported by an advanced vibration damping system and 74 mm skateboard wheels, provide a smooth and exhilarating skating experience for beginners and experienced skateboarders alike.
description: 33-inch wireless remote control surf Longboard skateboard is designed for cruising, sliding, carving, freeride, and freestyle. It is everything you need to hit the hills or streets. ▶FEATURES: 1. Maple deck, max load of 200 lbs(90kg). 2. 5KG, 33in portable Hand-carrying & lightweight. 3. 4-speed adjustment wireless remote control. 4. The high-density diamond sand surfaces are non-slip and waterproof. 5. 29.4V/2000mAh 2272 UL certification lithium battery, range 15km. 6. 350W High-efficiency brushless motor, 25km/h top speed, the climbing slope is 18°. 7. High elastic PU wheel, shock absorption, low noise, rear resistance, and better grip. ▶SPECIFICATION: - Name: Electric Skateboard - Material: 8-Layer Maple, PU Wheels - Load Capacity: 90kg - Product Weight: 5kg - Wheel Size: 74x51mm - Product Size: 83 X 23 X 17cm - Low-Speed Mode: ≤10km/H - Medium Speed Mode: 15km/H - High-Speed Mode: 25km/H - Climbing Angle: 18° - Remote Control Frequency: 2.4 Ghz - Remote Control Distance: 8-10m - Battery: 2000mah Lithium Battery - Range: 15km - Maximum Speed: 25km/h - Power: 350W Single Motor ▶PACKING LIST: 1 X Electric Skateboard 1 X Power Supply 1 X Remote Control 1 X USB Charging Cable 1x Electric Skateboard Spanner ▶NOTE: 1. Due to manual measurement, please allow1-2cm error, thank you for your understanding; 2. Please read the user manual carefully before using our electric skateboard for adults.
